citation.description: regression and undetermined asserted; plan_defect at heldout:81, env_integration at heldout:100

criteria.criterion: tests/scripts/test_backfill_bug_class.py passes (tier scripts): the four fixtures classify to regression, plan_defect, env_integration, undetermined respectively (exact-value asserts on the emitted record's close_class).

citation.description: test_bug_with_existing_close_class_is_skipped asserts ticket absent from output; script enforces at backfill_bug_class.py:97

criteria.criterion: A bug that already has state['close_class'] is NOT overwritten/re-emitted (idempotence + authoritative-value protection) — asserted.

citation.description: test_backfill_records_are_labeled_and_nonauthoritative asserts all three conditions; script sets source/confidence at backfill_bug_class.py:106-108

criteria.criterion: Every backfilled record carries source=="backfill_classified" and confidence=="classified", and is_authoritative(record.source) is False — asserted on the output, proving segregation from authoritative series.

citation.description: test_comment_only_revert_not_regression asserts close_class == undetermined for COMMENT-only revert; script enforces via _SUBSTANTIVE_REVERT_TARGETS = {'STATUS','COMMITS'} at backfill_bug_class.py:34

criteria.criterion: A REVERT whose only target_event_type is COMMENT does NOT yield regression (falls through to undetermined) — asserted, proving the substantive-revert filter.
